description: Machine-readable PF-Core public claim surface. Issuance of modes with allowed_issuance=false fails closed under --release-grade and the default public CLI.

modes.description: Sole release-candidate LeanKernelChecked path for tool-use traces (resource-pattern refined TraceSafeR).
Legacy base TraceSafe path for non-tool-use traces only; not release-grade for tool-use.
Disabled pending handoff evidence fidelity repair.
Contract evidence fidelity repaired (semantics_layer projection + explicit contract_ids); remains disabled for public RC until a later enablement pass. Issuable via --allow-non-public-modes.
Independent PFCoreEffectFrame.v0 + non-tautological frame membership repaired; remains disabled for public RC until a later enablement pass. Issuable via --allow-non-public-modes.
Transition redesign landed (explicit stepState witnesses; applyEvent no-ops rejected); remains disabled for public RC until a later enablement pass. Issuable via --allow-non-public-modes.

Experimental A6 compositional extension: safe prefix + EventSafe + successful stepState + preserved FrameValid frames => TraceSafe extended trace. Not release_candidate. Prefix-only TraceSafe chaining is the narrower TracePrefixSafe claim (see scaffolded_modes).

scaffolded_modes.description: Experimental alias for certificates that only prove each prefix is TraceSafe (no operational Applies / frame preservation). Prefer CompositionalExtensionCertificate for the A6 substantive predicate. Not in CERTIFICATE_MODES issuance surface yet.

Scaffolded only. Runtime evidence does not yet support post-deny closure of tool/mutation/network/message/code/release/state/delegation effects beyond declared footprints (EventSafeDenyClosed). Do not ship as a public claim. Base TraceSafe unchanged.

external_claim_classes.description: External CertifyEdge CertificateChecked attestation is preview until authenticated CertifyEdge pin.
